name: Lakeview Hills Country Club
description: Lakeview Hills Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Lexington, MI. There are 3 indoor asphalt and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Lester Park
description: Lester Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
